title: rubus fruticosus subsp. corylifolius
intro: Rubus fruticosus subsp. corylifolius, also known as the blackberry bramble, is a type of wild blackberry native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus subsp. corylifolius include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting digestive health and immunity. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
